# Arlen curated zsh default plugin set (TM-R2, terminal.md §3).
#
# antidote resolves and orders these at IMAGE BUILD into a single static,
# .zwc-compiled bundle (so the first shell start is warm). A default-plugin
# update ships with an OS update, not a `git pull`.
#
# Only the zsh-function plugins live here. The binaries (starship, fzf, zoxide,
# eza, bat, ripgrep, fd) are installed as packages and wired up in zshrc, not as
# antidote plugins. fast-syntax-highlighting must load LAST (it wraps the line
# editor), so it is listed after autosuggestions - antidote preserves order.

zsh-users/zsh-autosuggestions
zdharma-continuum/fast-syntax-highlighting
